title: SunFlax Crunch Wrap
description: A tangy and crunchy solo dinner dish featuring a blend of sunflower oil for added flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed greens
ingredients.notes: Use any combination of spinach, arugula, and romaine

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh parsley or cilantro (optional)
Sunflower seeds, toasted and coarsely ground
ingredients.notes: Toasted sunflower seeds can be used as a topping or mixed into the greens for added crunch

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the mixed greens, lime juice from two limes, minced garlic (if using), salt, and finely chopped parsley or cilantro.
Drizzle with sunflower oil until the mixture is evenly moist but not dripping.
Garnish with toasted and coarsely ground sunflower seeds if desired.
Serve immediately as a side dish for a solo dinner experience.
